name: UsbMassStorage
description: USB Mass Storage ('USB Transfer' mode) — exposes the SD card block device to a host over USB-MSC via arduino-esp32's USBMSC class. Opt-in per board (FREEINK_CAP_USB_MSC); links a no-op stub and pulls in no TinyUSB code when disabled.
keywords: usb, msc, mass storage, tinyusb, sdcard, otg
